“Well, no,” said Sabrina. “You don’t.”

“Hold on. What?” said Mark.

“Actually, Macy, you have my body,” Sabrina admitted. “Mostly. The boobs are Maggie’s.”

“Sabrina, what are you doing?” Ben asked.

“They all saw what happened. I couldn’t lie.”

“Are you telling us you’ve been using that thing on Mark?” asked Jess. “Without his consent?”

“Wait, wait, wait... Are we all swapped with someone?” asked Lexi. “Whose body do I have?”

“If everyone will just calm down, I can fix everything,” said Sabrina. “I’m gonna give everyone their real bodies.”

“How do we know you’re telling the truth?” Macy demanded.

“I don’t want to be swapped without my knowledge,” said Lexi. “Just tell me which body is mine.”

“This one,” said Ben, adjusting the glasses on his face. “You’re swapped with me.”

“And this body is Mark’s,” said Sabrina.

“And Jess is swapped with me,” said Maggie. “But we can fix it.”

“Right. I’m gonna have to fix the settings, but-”

“Wait a minute,” said Lexi. “If you switch us around again, are we going to see it?”

“Well... no. We have to put you back to normal, and give you back your real memories,” said Sabrina. “Look, let me just swap Mark and Macy back, and then we can talk about it.”

*FLASH*

“Oh, thank god,” Macy sighed, collapsing back onto the couch in her own body.

“Okay, so, if I’ve already been swapped once,” said Lexi, “that means that the life I remember having is only partly real, right? I went through the same stuff... just, not with this body.”

“As far as we can tell, that’s pretty much how it works,” said Ben.

“That is so freaky,” said Jess.

“Well, in that case, how about an experiment?” Lexi suggested. “Give us all the bodies that you say belong to us, but leave our minds the way they are now.”

“I guess we could try that,” said Sabrina. “That is, if everyone is okay with it.”

“This is my body, right? My actual body?” asked Macy.

“Right.”

“Well then I don’t care what you do.”

“I guess that’s an interesting idea,” said Mark.

“I don’t know,” said Jess. “I don’t like that you’ve messed with our minds.”

“We didn’t mean any harm. We were just having a little fun,” said Sabrina. “We’re only going to do this if everyone agrees. Jess, if you’re not comfortable with it, we can go ahead and fix everything, and you’ll have your real memories back.”
11112111112211111.title: Tell everyone the truth

111121111122111111.content:
“I guess I trust you, Sabrina,” said Jess. “Let’s do it.”

A few seconds and flashes later, everyone was back in their proper bodies, but Jess, Mark, Lexi, and Macy still remembered the alternate reality.

“So these are your real bodies?” said Macy, standing up and looking around at everyone.

“Mostly,” said Maggie, giving her borrowed boobs a pat.

“Weird,” said Macy. “You all know that remembering who’s who is going to be hard for me, right?”

“This is crazy,” said Mark. “I’m hot. And I have a dick!”

“And I... don’t,” said Lexi. “I guess that makes sense. I’m a girl.”

“There’s a lot that suddenly makes sense,” said Jess. “Like the fact that I’m white. It’s like... of course I’m white. Why would I not be white?”

“And you’re hot,” said Mark. “I mean, not that your other body wasn’t.”

“So, what do we do now?” asked Lexi. “Do we just... hang out?”

“The rest of you can hang out all you want. I think I want some alone time with my boyfriend. His new body is so much more my type,” said Jess, leading Mark out of the room.

“Sure. Now they leave,” said Macy, rolling her eyes.

“What about you guys?” Lexi asked Sabrina and company. “You sticking around? You did kind of make this whole mess, after all.”
111121111122111111.title: Try the experiment

1111211111221111112.content:
“Why don’t we split up?” said Maggie. “We can all meet up again later and discuss how you’ve adjusted to your bodies.”

“Good idea,” said Lexi.

“Wait a minute,” said Macy, stopping Sabrina from leaving. “Are you taking that thing with you?”

“Well, yeah,” said Sabrina.

“I don’t think so. Give it to us.”

“Are you serious?” asked Ben.

“Yes,” said Macy. “There’s a whole dorm building full of people that don’t need you irresponsibly swapping their bodies around.”

“Don’t you think they’ve learned their lesson, Macy?” asked Lexi.

“I do not.”

“Fine. Here,” said Sabrina, handing the remote over.

“I don’t think that was a good idea,” said Ben, as the trio left the room.

“He’s right,” said Macy, closing the door once they were far away. “So, Lexi, wanna irresponsibly swap people’s bodies around?”

Lexi smirked. “You’re such a bad person. But yes.”
1111211111221111112.title: Split up

11112111112211111121.content:
“How does that body feel?” Macy asked. “Does it feel natural? Or do you feel weird?”

“A little bit of both,” said Lexi, sitting back down at her laptop and looking at herself in the camera. “My mind is trying really hard to convince me that this is right, because it’s female and my other body was male, but... when I look at this face, all I see is Ben.”

“Well, for what it’s worth, both of your bodies are attractive,” Macy reassured her.

“That’s only so helpful,” said Lexi, closing her computer and walking over to place it on the card table. “Hey, do you want to try out this body?”

“You want to switch with me?”

“If I’m going to have an unfamiliar body, I’d feel better if it wasn’t a body that I remember belonging to a boy.”

“Did you forget that I see that as Ben’s body too?”

“We don’t have to,” said Lexi. “It’s up to you.”

“We could try something simpler,” said Macy, scanning the remote’s buttons. “It looks like there’s a clothing option.”

“Like I said, it’s up to you.”
11112111112211111121.title: Swap with each other

111121111122111111212.content:
*FLASH*

“There,” said Macy. “Now you’re at least dressed in clothes that are more like what you’re used to.”

Lexi looked down at the AC/DC shirt, jeans, and vans she now wore. “I guess so,” she said. “Oh my god, look at you!”

Macy now wore Lexi’s green top and black leggings, and her fingernails and toenails were painted purple. But the things that really threw Lexi off were that Macy was now wearing glasses, and her hair was no longer dyed black. Her natural dirty blonde color was on display, somewhere between Lexi’s brown and Sabrina’s blonde. Macy’s hair was also now tied up in a bun like Lexi’s had been, but it looked a little different since Macy’s hair was shorter.

“This is weird,” said Macy, lifting up the glasses and squinting, then putting them back in place.

“I know. Ben is so blind,” said Lexi. “Or... I guess I am. Or you are, now.”

“It’s strange that eyesight is considered part of clothing.”

“I guess the remote thinks if you’re wearing glasses, it should be for a reason,” said Lexi, now looking at her own hair colored with Macy’s black hair dye. “So... are we the only ones who can see this?”

“I’m not sure,” Macy admitted. “I think I touched one of these awareness settings, but I guess there’s only one way to find out.”

Lexi grabbed her laptop, and Macy held the remote behind her back, then the two girls opened the door and headed out into the hallway. There, they spotted Jess and Mark coming out of Jess’s room.

“Wow, you guys finished fast,” Macy said, half-mockingly.

“It was just so exciting,” said Mark. “Our... parts actually fit together, and I... I...”

“It’s okay, baby,” Jess said, kissing him on the cheek. The couple then looked at Lexi and Macy.
111121111122111111212.title: Clothing swap

1111211111221111112121.content:
“So you two used that remote,” Jess observed. “You both look... interesting.”

“It’s safer with us than it is with Sabrina and her idiot boyfriend,” said Macy. “At least for now.”

“You plan on using it some more?” Mark guessed.

“Please tell me you’re going to be responsible,” said Jess. “The last thing we need is more people dragged into this weirdness.”

“We’re just going to have harmless fun,” said Lexi.

“Yeah. Harmless,” Macy said with a half-cocked smile.

“Let’s hang out with them, Jess,” said Mark. “I kinda want to see this stuff.”

“Mark, I have to go do that art assignment at the museum, remember?”

“So?”

“So, you’re coming with me, right?”

“You know that art is boring to me,” said Mark. “I’d rather do this.”

Jess crossed her arms and looked at Mark angrily. They would need to have a talk about this later. But for now, she needed to decide if she trusted her boyfriend alone with these two girls and the remote.
1111211111221111112121.title: They see the outfit swap

11112111112211111121211.content:
“As soon as I get back, you and I are having a discussion,” Jess scolded Mark, then turned on her heel and left to go meet up with her friends.

“Hey, let me see that remote,” Mark said to Macy.

“What are you gonna do?”

“Can I just see it?”
11112111112211111121211.title: Jess leaves

111121111122111111212111.content:
“Fine. Here.”

“Sweet,” Mark said, quickly looking over the settings, adjusting something, then aiming at Jess.

*FLASH*

The change wasn’t immediately apparent. Lexi and Macy looked back and forth between Mark and Jess until the latter was out of sight.

“Okay, I give up,” said Macy. “What did you do?”

“Doesn’t matter,” said Mark. “She won’t notice it anyway. At least I hope not.”

Mark was correct. He had managed to adjust only Jess’s awareness, and switched their genitals. Jess was now walking around with a dick and balls between her legs, thinking it was normal. It was only a matter of time before someone spotted the bulge in her leggings though.

“Okay then. Where to now?” asked Macy. “Lexi, you’ve been quiet. What do you want to do next?”
111121111122111111212111.title: Yes

11112111112211111121212.content:
“I can’t believe I keep putting up with you,” said Jess, texting her friends to let them know she wasn’t coming.

“You two don’t mind us joining you, do you?” Mark asked.

“I don’t,” said Lexi.

“I kind of do, but I’ll get over it,” said Macy.

“What are we doing, anyway?” asked Jess.
11112111112211111121212.title: Jess stays

1111211111221111112122.content:
“Hey, does Sabrina still have that weird remote thing?” Jess asked.

“Probably,” Macy lied, discreetly passing the remote to Lexi, who slid it into the back pocket of her borrowed pants.

“Do you know where they went?” Jess asked.

“Nope,” Macy said honestly.

“Okay, well, I guess we’ll see you later,” said Jess, grabbing Mark by the hand once again and leading him away.

“Let’s get out of here,” Macy said to Lexi. “Go put your laptop away, then meet me in my car.”

——————————

“Hey, so where are we going?” Lexi asked, sitting down in the passenger seat of Macy’s hand-me-down Pontiac and buckling her seat belt.

“I thought we’d just drive around,” said Macy, putting the car in gear. “You still have the remote, right?”

“Sure do,” said Lexi, noticing that Macy had added a white skirt and a pair of brown sandals to her outfit. “Do you want it?”

“Eh, it’s probably better if you have it,” said Macy, driving out of the dorm parking lot and onto the street. “Let me know when you see someone you want to mess with.”

Lexi looked over the remote like everyone else had, studying it. Once she felt like she more or less understood what she was looking at, she looked out the window.

It looked like Macy was headed downtown. There would be plenty of people there. Then again, if they turned off now, they could make the exit toward Adventure Heights, an amusement park outside of the city.
1111211111221111112122.title: They don’t see it

choices: Split up and get accustomed to these bodies
1111211111221112.content:
“A little is fine,” Macy responded to Jess. “Just don’t go crazy.”

“Excuse me, one kiss is not ‘going crazy’,” Jess retorted.

“We should definitely go,” said Sabrina, prompting the trio to get up and make their way to the hall.

“Lexi, do you care if Mark kisses me?” the friends heard Jess carry on as they exited the room.

“Can I just do my work, please?”

“Lexi might not care, but everyone else is leaving. They couldn’t even be around you and Mark for five minutes.”

“They’re leaving because you started shit.”

“That was a smart decision,” said Ben, muffling the sound of the argument by closing the door behind them. “Seems like those two don’t get along.”

“You have no idea,” said Sabrina, rolling her eyes. “Guys are so lucky to not have drama in their DNA.”

“You’d be surprised,” said Ben.

“Speaking of biology,” said Maggie, “I’m curious to see if hormones will affect how the two of you start acting.”

“Well, I guess that would depend on how long we stay like this,” Sabrina said, once again flexing and admiring Mark’s muscular arms. “It’s too bad we can’t tell people about the remote. As bio majors, this would make for a great study for me and Ben.“

“You’re telling me,” said Ben, feeling the smoothness of Lexi’s face. “How long do you want to keep these bodies?”

“It’s not like we all have to switch back at the same time,” said Maggie. “We could each just switch back whenever we’re ready.”

“That’s true,” said Sabrina. “What do we do now?”
1111211111221112.title: Leave

111121111122112.content:
“I guess I’ll go with Macy,” said Sabrina. “I’m not ready to be a boy.”

*FLASH*

“So weird,” Sabrina said, now sporting Macy’s body and boyish outfit,

“So, we’re all girls,” Ben asked, putting Lexi’s glasses back on and brushing her hair out of his face. “What do we do now?”

“I think technically the world still sees you as you. A boy with female parts,” Maggie corrected him.

“And I guess the world also thinks it’s normal that you have Lexi’s fashion sense,” said Sabrina. “I know! Let’s take Ben to the mall and have a girls’ day!”

“That is a great idea!” Maggie agreed.

“Wait? Really?” said Ben. “What if I don’t want to?”

“Here,” said Sabrina. “You can have the remote. While we’re out, you get to swap people around. Just don’t do anything careless.”

“Deal,” said Ben.

“Okay, so once we get to the mall, where do we take Ben first?” asked Maggie.
111121111122112.title: Macy

1111211111222.content:
“Woah. Really?” Sabrina asked, surprised that Ben would choose such a girly girl.

“Yeah. Macy and Lexi are eights, but Jess is a solid ten.”

“Ah,” Sabrina said. “Got it. You’re just interested in looks. You’re such a guy.”

“Not for long, he’s not,” Maggie remarked.

Sabrina smiled, made sure the remote’s settings were right, then activated it. The three friends saw the flash again, and when it faded, Ben now had Jess’s body and clothes.

“Sweet,” said Ben, immediately grabbing his new boobs and squeezing them.

“Well, you have to admit, he’s right,” Maggie said, watching Ben grope himself. “Solid ten, even in that frumpy hoodie.”

“Check that out,” Sabrina said, pointing at the pool table where Jess stood, now with Ben’s body.

The trio watched as Mark flirted with his girlfriend, completely unfazed by the fact that she looked like a guy. When Mark went in for a kiss, Maggie and Sabrina watched, giggling, while Ben was disgusted.

“Gross. My body just kissed Mark.”

“Hey, what if one of us switches with Mark?” Maggie suggested.

“Sounds fun,” said Sabrina. “Do you want to do it? Or were you gonna say that I should do it?”
1111211111222.title: Jess

11112111112222.content:
“I think you should swap lives with Mark,” said Maggie.

“Lives?”

“Yeah. Then you’ll be in a relationship with Ben. I mean... Jess. Jess with Ben’s body. You know what I mean,” said Maggie.

“If Mark is unaware of the swap, then he’ll think he’s Sabrina, right?” asked Ben.

“That should be how it works,” said Sabrina.

“Do you think the new Sabrina will know about the remote?”

“Might as well find out,” said Sabrina, handing the remote to Maggie. “Swap me with Mark.”

*FLASH*

Everyone’s bodies remained in the same place, but now Mark’s body was inhabited by Sabrina. Looking at her friends and winking, Sabrina moved in and grabbed Jess, going in for a kiss. A very long kiss.

“Even though I know that’s Sabrina, it’s still weird to see my body kissing a guy,” said Ben.

Ben and Maggie looked at Sabrina’s body, seated between them.

“Hey... Sabrina?” said Maggie.

“Yeah?” the brainwashed Mark responded.

“Do you know what this is?” Maggie asked, holding up the remote.
11112111112222.title: Sabrina

111121111122221.content:
“Of course I do. That’s the swapping remote. You just used it to swap me with Mark.”

“So... you know that you’re Mark?” Ben asked.

“I know I’m not the original Sabrina. But, I don’t feel like Mark. I feel like Sabrina. I have her memories, and her personality.”

“Weird,” said Ben. “What do you want us to call you? Sabrina Two?”

“How about New Sabrina,” suggested Maggie.

“I guess I’m okay with New Sabrina.”

“How long do you think OG Sabrina is going to keep Mark’s life?” Ben wondered, watching Sabrina lead Jess out of the common room, trying not to think about what they were probably about to do.

“There’s no telling,” said Maggie. “But for now, we have two Sabrinas. So... New Sabrina, what do you want to do?”

“Keep testing the remote, I guess,” said New Sabrina.

“Hmm. I guess it’s my turn to switch with someone,” said Maggie, looking at the remote. “I guess I’ll switch with...”
111121111122221.title: He/she knows

111121111122222.content:
“It looks like a remote,” the new Sabrina guessed. “Does it go to a TV or something?”

“No, it’s... it’s just junk,” said Maggie.

“What did we come in here for, anyway?”

“We were just talking,” Ben lied. “But you can go now.”

“Right,” said Mark/Sabrina, standing and leaving the room.

“How weird is that?” said Maggie.

“Hey, guys,” the real Sabrina whispered, coming over to her friends. “Where did my body just go?”

“No idea, but Mark thinks he’s the real you,” said Ben. “And he... or she... doesn’t know about the remote. Your body is basically on autopilot right now. We can switch you back whenever you want.”

“Gotcha,” said Sabrina, returning to her pool game with her “girlfriend”.

“Well, what now?” asked Maggie.

“We can go find Eric,” Ben suggested, brushing a loose strand of Jess’s hair out of his face. “Unless you wanted to keep messing with the people in here.”
111121111122222.title: He/she doesn’t know

111121111123.content:
“Maggie, if I swapped you with someone, who would you want to be?” Sabrina asked her friend.

“If you had Macy’s life, do you think you would get her hair dye?” Ben wondered.

“I would imagine hair dye is considered part of clothes, so probably,” Maggie guessed. “Not that it would matter. My hair is already black anyway.”

“Yeah, but then we would get to see Macy’s natural hair,” said Sabrina.

“What about Lexi?” Ben asked. “What would happen with her glasses if we swapped you with her?”

“What about one of them,” said Maggie, pointing at Mark and Jess.

“I get it,” said Sabrina. “You want to be Jess so you can have a hot boyfriend.”

“Actually, I was thinking Mark,” said Maggie. “Just to shake things up.”

“Is that your decision?” asked Sabrina, preparing the remote.

“I don’t know. Surprise me,” Maggie said, closing her eyes.

Sabrina thought for a moment, and decided to switch Maggie with...
111121111123.title: Give Maggie someone else’s life

1111211112.content:
The girls arrived at the park to find Ben sitting on a bench, dressed in a black t-shirt, blue jeans, and a pair of black Vans shoes. He waved to them, and they made their way over and sat down next to him.

“Hi Ben,” said Maggie. “Before you ask, Sabrina told me about the remote.”

“I hope that’s okay,” said Sabrina.

“That’s cool with me,” said Ben.

“So, let’s get started,” said Sabrina, pulling out the remote. “What should we do with this thing?”

“Well, I’ve been looking around since I got here, thinking about all these people we could use as test subjects. There’s a guy and a girl on a date over there, but since there’s three of us, I guess that wouldn’t work so well.”

“What about that family?” asked Maggie, pointing to a young girl with her father and mother. “That could be fun.”

“Oh! Hey! Look over there. What about those women?” said Sabrina, pointing to three women who appeared to be in their thirties or forties, doing a yoga routine together.

“All of those seem like they would be weird, but I guess there’s no point in using the remote if we wanted to be normal,” Ben remarked.

“I’d be okay with any of those choices,” said Maggie. “Sabrina, you have the remote. You choose.”

“Alright,” said Sabrina. “I think we should switch with...”
1111211112.title: The park

11112111121.content:
“I think we should switch with the couple.”

“But there’s only two of them, like I just said,” Ben noted.

“So one of us can be an observer,” said Sabrina, reaching down to pluck three blades of grass out of the ground and tearing one of them in half. “We’ll draw straws, so to speak. Short piece of grass stays normal and gets to study everyone’s behavior. The other two can then decide who gets to be the guy and who gets to be the girl.”

“Sounds good to me,” said Maggie.

“Alright,” agreed Ben.

Sabrina then closed her fist around the blades of grass, and shuffled them a bit. Ben and Maggie then each took a piece for themselves, and the three looked at the results.

“That settles it,” said Sabrina.

The two people who would swap places with the couple were...
11112111121.title: The couple

111121111211.content:
“Alright, Ben,” said Sabrina. “Do you want to be the guy or the girl?”

“I want to be the guy, obviously.”

“Just figured I’d ask,” said Sabrina. She then handed the remote to Maggie. “Okay, so switch Ben with him, and then switch me with her. Make sure you do body and life. And make sure you set it so that they don’t know anything’s wrong.”

Maggie adjusted the settings, then fired the remote twice. She then looked at the bodies of Ben and Sabrina, who looked confused, as if they didn’t know why they were here. Maggie looked over at the couple, and the boyfriend looked back, motioning for Maggie to come over.

“Um, you two can hang out without me. I just remembered, I know those two people,” Maggie lied to the new Ben and Sabrina, walking away to join the real Ben and Sabrina. Once she got to where they were sitting, she asked, “So, it worked, right?”
111121111211.title: Sabrina and Ben

choices: Find Maggie someone to swap with
1111211112111.content:
“This is crazy,” said Ben, admiring his new body. “I’m just some random guy.”

“It feels so weird,” Sabrina said, rubbing her hands all over her new face.

Ben’s new body was a Hispanic man of about 30, dressed in a button down shirt and khaki shorts. Sabrina’s new body was a white woman of the same age, with clearly dyed blonde hair, and dressed in a blue tank top and black jeans. A pair of men’s boat shoes and a pair of women’s sneakers sat nearby in the grass.

“I’m so tall!” Ben noted, standing up and towering over his friends.

“And I’m... the same height as before,” said Sabrina.

“Wow. It’s really you guys in there,” said Maggie. “It’s unreal.”

“You should try it,” said Ben. “Let’s find you a body. What do you think?”
1111211112111.title: Yup

1111211112112.content:
“Yes and no,” the woman’s body answered, standing up. “Whoa... having boobs throws off your balance more than I thought.”

“Well, I clearly messed up,” said Maggie, amused.

“No kidding,” Ben remarked, brushing blonde hair out of his face. The color was obviously not natural, and his new body, about 30, was barefoot and dressed in a blue tank top and black jeans.

“I was supposed to be the girl,” Sabrina said, annoyed. Her new body was a Hispanic man, also about 30, dressed in a button down shirt and khaki shorts, and as she too stood up, they noted that she was now much taller than the others.

“Give me a break,” said Maggie. “It was my first time using this. Should I try to fix it?”
1111211112112.title: Not exactly

111121111212.content:
“Alright,” said Sabrina, “Ben, you probably want to be the guy.”

“Actually,” said Maggie, “I would like to be the guy. I mean, if that’s okay with Ben.”
111121111212.title: Ben and Maggie

111121111213.content:
“Wow, okay,” said Sabrina. “Well Maggie, do you want to be my girlfriend, or my boyfriend?”

Maggie thought for a moment. “I’d like to be the boyfriend. If that’s okay with you, I mean.”

“Fine by me. He is cute.” Sabrina then handed the remote to Ben. “Okay, switch our bodies and lives, and make sure only the three of us are aware of it.”

“Got it,” said Ben, fixing the settings. “I do have one question. Do you want me to hang out with you, or stay with your bodies?”

Maggie spoke up, “I think it would be wise for you to be with...”
111121111213.title: Maggie and Sabrina

choices: Go check out the family’s home
11112111122.content:
“I think we should switch with the family.”

“What are we switching?” asked Ben.

“Switching lives seems like the craziest choice. Go big or go home, right?” Sabrina remarked.

“Well, who gets to be who?” asked Maggie.

Sabrina grinned. “That’ll be a surprise. Everyone put your hands on the remote.”

Ben and Maggie placed their hands in, and Sabrina fired at the family.

*FLASH*

Ben rubbed his eyes with one hand, and noticed that he was now sitting cross-legged on a picnic mat with a nearly empty bag of fruit snacks in his other hand. He looked down at his outfit to confirm that Sabrina did exactly what he suspected she might do. She swapped Ben with the little girl. He was now dressed in a pink romper with white stripes, and sparkly Frozen themed velcro shoes. He also had a hairband on his head, topped with a little white bow.

“Thanks a lot, mom,” Ben remarked, looking at Sabrina dressed in the mother’s yellow sundress and brown sandals.

“Aww, you’re so cute,” Maggie joked, squeezing Ben’s cheeks. She was now dressed in the father’s light blue button down shirt, blue jeans, and brown loafers.

“Don’t call me cute,” said Ben standing up. “It looks like it worked.”

The three looked over and saw that the little girl was now dressed in Ben’s clothes, the mother in Sabrina’s, and the father in Maggie’s, and they seemed to be heading back to the dorms.

“We should spend the day like this. It’ll be easy to get back to our old lives,” said Sabrina.

“Alright. What should we do?” asked Maggie.

Sabrina then suggested that they...
11112111122.title: The family

11112112.content:
“Actually, you know what, we probably shouldn’t use it again until I meet up with Ben tomorrow,” Sabrina said.

“How come?”

“Well, I don’t want us to accidentally mess up any of the settings. We need to take the time to figure it all out. You can come with us if you want.”

“Okay,” Maggie said. “Well, good night I guess.”

“Yeah, good night.”

Maggie watched Sabrina put the device back in her purse. Once the lights were out, Sabrina fell asleep pretty fast. Maggie had a little trouble sleeping though. She thought about using the remote while Sabrina was asleep. But that wouldn’t be right. She couldn’t break her friend’s trust like that. Or could she? Sabrina did say that the user could control who notices the changes, so... no, it would be wrong... then again...
11112112.title: Sabrina declines

111121121.content:
Feeling a bit of a mischievous streak coming on, Maggie went for Sabrina’s purse and pulled out the remote. It was hard to read some of the labels in the dark, but Maggie pushed some buttons anyway.

Hoping that she had input the correct settings, Maggie aimed the device at Sabrina, hoping to switch their boobs without Sabrina ever knowing.
111121121.title: Use the remote

1111211211.content:
The flash came and went again, and Maggie saw that she was successful. Smiling, she carefully put the remote back, then got into her own bed.

The difference was immediately noticeable. Maggie’s chest was... well, heavier. She was almost woefully aware of that every time she tried shifting her weight or sleeping on her side. Still, it felt good.

In the morning, Maggie and Sabrina awoke at pretty much the same time, and began preparing themselves for the day.

“Whew,” Ben sighed. “Well, apparently we’re the only ones who see the problem.”

“That’s good, I guess,” said Sabrina. “But now we have to find this Edwards person.”

“Yeah, you’re right,” Ben agreed. “But where do we start?”

“We could try to find a phone book,” Sabrina suggested.

“Where would we find a phone book?”

“The library?”

“Maybe,” said Ben. “But maybe it would be easier to put up a flyer or something. Let Edwards come to us.”
11212231121211.title: Oliver thinks they’re normal

choices: Go out and risk being seen
11212231121212.content:
“Hey Ben,” Oliver waved. “Uh, what is this?”

“What is what?” Ben feigned ignorance.

“Dude, you’re in a dress.”

“Uh, yeah. I sure am,” said Ben. “It’s uh... well...”

“Wait a second, do you have tits?”

“His bra is stuffed,” Sabrina blurted out.

“That doesn’t explain the cleavage,” Oliver noted. “Or the shaved legs. What’s going on?”

“Dammit Oliver,” said Ben. “Why can’t you ignore the moviegoers like a good employee?”

Ben dragged Oliver and Sabrina back into the theater and let the door close behind them.

“Listen dude, we’re going through a bit of a thing right now,” Ben whispered. “We were hoping no one would notice. But you did. Now, I’m asking you to keep quiet about this.”

“So this is real? You guys are, like, switched? How did this happen?”

“It’s a weird story,” said Sabrina. “But the explanation doesn’t matter. What matters now is that we get back to normal.”

Oliver thought for a moment. “Do you guys need a place to hide?”

“What?” Ben asked.

“I can help you. You guys can hide out here in the theater while I get you some clothes that will hide your bodies.”

“You want to help us?” said Sabrina. “Why? You barely know us.”

“I know Ben,” said Oliver. “And besides, this is awesome! It’s like a movie!”

“It’s not a movie,” said Ben.

“Dude, you literally just sat through a movie about a man and a woman switching bodies,” Oliver explained. “It’s exactly like a movie. You need to switch back, right? I can help. I want to help. Come on. You don’t really want to go out there looking like this, do you?”

Sabrina and Ben looked at each other, and made a decision.
11212231121212.title: Oliver can tell that they’re swapped

112122311212121.content:
“Fine,” said Sabrina. “We’ll let you help us.”

“Where do you plan on getting spare clothes from?” Ben asked.

“We have a lost and found,” said Oliver. “People leave jackets behind all the time. I’ll be right back.”

With that, Ben and Sabrina were alone again.

“You know,” Sabrina spoke up, giggling a little, “for what it’s worth, you’re pretty good at sucking dick.”

“Ugh. Don’t say that,” Ben said, sighing,

“You picked out a cute outfit too.”

“Well, that’s because when I got dressed this morning, my mind was messed up. I was thinking as if I had been dressing like this my whole life.”

“That remote... the way that it changes reality... altered our minds... why would someone make something like that?”

“I don’t know,” said Ben. “But we’re gonna find out.”

The next moment, Oliver returned, carrying a trenchcoat and a large hoodie. “Alright, take your pick.”

“These are our options?” Ben asked.

“It’s been a slow week,” Oliver remarked.

“I’ll take the hoodie,” said Sabrina. “Ben, you should wear the trenchcoat to hide your shaved legs. Well, my legs. You know what I mean.”

“Should we switch shoes too?” Ben asked. “People are gonna notice a boy in heels.”

Sabrina and Ben both removed their shoes. Ben was able to easily fit Sabrina’s feet into his own sneakers. Sabrina, though, had some trouble.

“These aren’t gonna fit me, Ben,” said Sabrina. “I’m sorry, but you’re going to have to wear them.”

Sighing, Ben took off his sneakers and put Sabrina’s ankle boots back on. “Well, thanks Oliver,” he said. “Are you gonna come with us? Or are you gonna stay here? It’s still early. Your shift probably won’t end for a while.”
112122311212121.title: Let Oliver help

1121223112122.content:
Satisfied, the two walked out of the theater. On the way out, Ben recognized the custodian.

“Hey Oliver,” Ben waved.

“Hey Ben,” Oliver waved back. “I like your dress.”

“Thanks,” said Ben.

“You on a date, or what?”

Ben smiled. “Yes we are. We’re on a date.”

Sabrina introduced herself and shook Oliver’s hand, throwing away the popcorn bag in the same motion.

“Nice to meet you. What did you two think of the movie?”

“Well, the parts we saw were fine,” Ben said, winking at Sabrina.

“I gotcha,” Oliver said, getting the message. “I’ve seen the whole thing. You didn’t miss much. Body swap movies just aren’t creative anymore. Well, have a good one!”

“You too,” said Ben, walking away hand in hand with Sabrina. “So we’re dating now, huh?”

“We are,” said Sabrina, smiling. “And I’m glad.”

“Me too. You know, as crazy as that remote was, it’s kind of responsible for us getting together,” Ben noted.

“In some twisted way, I guess you’re right,” said Sabrina. “And I’m grateful. But I don’t ever want to see that thing again. Let’s forget about what happened last night.”

“Fine with me. We can just agree that we imagined the whole thing,” said Ben.
1121223112122.title: Life goes on

11212231121221.content:
When Sabrina awoke the next day, she felt strange. She had dreamed about a life where things were... different. She sat up in her bed, with the strangest feeling that something wasn’t right. Something about herself. But when she pulled off her covers and examined herself, everything seemed fine.

She had slept shirtless, as she often did, and her present-but-not-toned abs were on display. She could also feel the familiar sensation of morning wood in her sweatpants, and since Maggie was in the bathroom, she made no effort to hide her erection as she stood up and stretched.

Deciding that she wanted to take a shower, Sabrina walked over to the bathroom and knocked on the door. “Morning, Mags,” she called out.

“Good morning,” she heard her roommate reply.

“How long are you gonna be?”

“Actually, I’m on my way out,” Maggie responded, opening the door and stepping out with her wet hair slicked back and her naked body wrapped in a towel.

Turning so they were back-to-back, the two girls began to slide past each other. In the doorway, Sabrina felt her arms brush against Maggie’s, causing a small static shock.

“The fuck?” Sabrina muttered as she felt the shock run through her entire body. Suddenly, she saw a flash of light, like the one caused by the remote when Ben had used it Friday night.

When it faded, Sabrina was almost afraid to look down, but she looked anyway.

“No way,” she whispered. Her head was now on Maggie’s slender, towel-swaddled body.
11212231121221.title: The next day

112122311212211.content:
“S...Sabrina?” Maggie managed to say, eyes wide.

“Oh, shit,” Sabrina muttered.

“What. The fuck. Just happened?”

Sabrina was quiet for a moment as she thought about what to say.

“Sabrina? You... you see this, right?” Maggie asked, trying not to freak out.

“Okay, um, I guess we should try to switch back.”

“What?”

“Maybe touching each other again will work.”

“I... ok. Alright. Let’s try.”

The two girls reached out slowly, and touched hands. They began to feel the static again, then saw the flash.

“Hey! It worked!” Sabrina said triumphantly.

“Please tell me you know what’s going on,” Maggie said, still in shock.

“Well, kind of,” Sabrina admitted. “Remember Friday night, when Ben found that remote on the ground?”

“Uh-huh.”

“It was... I don’t know how to describe it. It switched us. Me and Ben. Like you and I were just now. And then we switched back. Then, yesterday, we were on a date, and we decided that the remote was dangerous, so Ben broke it. But now, it seems like... I don’t know, like, the remote’s energy or something... is in me.”

“You know that if I hadn’t just switched bodies with you, I would call you crazy, right?”

“That’s because it is crazy,” said Sabrina. “I was really hoping that nothing weird would happen after destroying that thing. I was prepared to write the whole thing off as a dream. But... now what? What do we do?”

“You said Ben was involved. Should we talk to him?”
112122311212211.title: Maggie sees it too

choices: Some old guy in a lab coat
11212231121222.content:
“Ben! We’re college graduates!” Sabrina squealed, lifting up her boyfriend and spinning around with him.

“I know!” said Ben, laughing. “Put me down!”

“I’m just excited!” Sabrina said, putting Ben back on the floor. “We have the rest of our lives ahead of us!”

After four years of study, Ben and Sabrina had both completed their undergraduate classes. Both of them had graduated with a Bachelor’s degree in Biology. Ben had completed his teaching credentials, and was hoping to find a job as a science teacher. Sabrina planned on continuing her education, so she could become a cancer researcher. Ben had also grown out a full beard, which Sabrina was very fond of.

After graduating, they had spent the day celebrating with their families. Ben’s parents had shown up, as well as Sabrina’s mother, and her sister Grace, who had just completed her own freshman year at the same university.

Ben and Sabrina no longer lived in the dorms. Thanks to Ben’s parents, and with a little help from Maggie, the couple had been living in an apartment for the last two years. Now, their parents had gone home, and they were getting ready for a small get-together that would be held at Maggie’s family home later that night. Maggie would be there, obviously, as well as Eric, Grace, and a few others.

“Can you believe that by the time I finish grad school, my sister will be done with her degree too?”

“Time flies,” Ben said, adjusting his boobs so they wouldn’t fall out of the extremely low-cut dress he had changed into. “And things change. But that can be good, you know?”

“You going somewhere with this?” Sabrina asked, trying to decide if she should wear a tie.

“No tie. It’s a party with friends,” said Ben. “And yes, I am. There’s something I need to say to you.”

“You’re not breaking up with me, are you?” Sabrina remarked, tossing the tie she had been holding onto her dresser.

“No,” Ben laughed. “I’m not breaking up with you.”

“You found a teaching job already?”

“No.”

“Are you... pregnant?”

“Will you just let me talk, woman?”

Sabrina giggled. “Alright, mister college graduate. Talk.”

“Sabrina,” Ben said, walking over and grabbing her hands, “I love you. You know that.”

“I love you too,” Sabrina said, smiling.

“I can’t imagine what the last three years would have been like without you. I don’t know if I would have made it. And I’m really thankful that you’re part of my life. So, I’d like to make that permanent.”

“Ben... are you... is this what I think it is?”

“Sabrina Green,” Ben said, revealing a ring, and hiking his dress up so he could get down on one knee, “will you marry me?”

“Oh my god, yes!” Sabrina blurted, practically yanking Ben up and passionately kissing him.

Ben smiled a huge smile and placed the ring on Sabrina’s finger.

“Ben! This is amazing!” Sabrina said. “Oh, I can’t wait to tell Grace! She’ll be here to pick us up any minute.”

“Well, I’m gonna take a good leak before we go,” said Ben, heading into the bathroom and closing the door.

Right after Ben locked himself in the bathroom, Sabrina heard a knock at their door. Heading out into the living space, she opened the door and saw...
11212231121222.title: A few years later

112122311212221.content:
Sabrina blinked. “Are you serious?”

Ben nodded.

“Ben! That’s awesome!” Sabrina shouted, rushing over to hug him. “It is mine, right?”

“Yes,” Ben laughed. “But, you know, this is gonna change things. We’re gonna have to be more careful with our money. And, we should probably...”

“Probably what?” Sabrina asked.

“You know what? I’m gonna do this right,” Ben said confidently. Hiking his dress up so he could get down on one knee, he looked up at his girlfriend. “I don’t have a ring yet, but... Sabrina Green, will you marry me?”

“Oh my god, yes!” Sabrina cried, practically yanking Ben up off the ground and kissing him passionately. “Oh, I’m so excited! I’m gonna be a mom!”

Suddenly, there was a knock at the door.

“That must be Grace here to pick us up,” said Sabrina, kissing Ben one more time before heading for the door and opening it to see...
112122311212221.title: Sabrina reacts with joy

choices: Ignore him and go to the party
112122311212222.content:
Standing at the door was a man in his fifties. He stood at roughly six feet tall, and his gray hair was cut neatly. He was quite handsome for a man his age. He was dressed in a plain black shirt, blue jeans, and a white lab coat.

“Uh, hello,” Sabrina greeted the stranger. “What can I do for you?”

“Well, for starters, you could open the door all the way and let me get a good look at you,” the man said, looking back and forth between Sabrina and a device in his hands.

Sabrina did as he said, revealing her entire body to him.

“Finally,” the man said, seeing the definitely male body standing before him. “I’ve found you.”

“I’m sorry. Who are you?”

“My name is Percy Edwards. And I’m looking for something that belongs to me.”

“Okay?”

“Come on, don’t play dumb with me, Miss...”

“Green. Sabrina Green. And I don’t think I know what you’re talking about.”

“Miss Green, three years ago, I lost a device. My log says it was used four times that day, but not once since then. I’ve spent the last three years coming up with a way to track it’s signature. Well, now I’ve found it. You have been swapped, Miss Green.”

“Oh. My. God. The remote that we found on the ground at the end of our freshman year,” Sabrina realized. “It wasn’t a dream? That actually happened?”

“So you do know what I’m talking about.”

“We... we used it to switch bodies, but we switched back,” Sabrina said, remembering the swaps that she had been able to see.

“You... switched back?”

“Uh-huh. And then we... destroyed it the next day.”

Percy’s eyes widened. “You did what?”

“I remember... not wanting it to fall into the wrong hands, so we destroyed it and threw away the pieces. But I guess we both decided that it was all just a dream.”

“So I suppose it’s just a dream that you’ve had a man’s body below your neck all this time?”

“Excuse me?”

“Miss Green... Sabrina, was it? Look at yourself. Can you think of any other women who have bodies like that?”

“I don’t know,” Sabrina said, thinking about it. “Transgender people exist.”

“You know that isn’t what I mean,” Percy frowned. “Miss Green, I think you should come with me. At my house, I have a device that will give you back your real memories. Then, we can work from there to get you back to normal.”

Sabrina pondered what Percy was saying. As far as she could remember, this was the body she had had her entire life. Then again, Percy’s words made sense. She couldn’t think of a single person aside from herself and Ben who had bodies typical of the opposite sex. Speaking of Ben, what would he think about all this?

Feeling her phone vibrate, Sabrina pulled it out and saw a text saying that Grace was close by. Sabrina closed her eyes. This was crazy. She had to make a decision. Ben could come out at any second, and he would no doubt ask who this stranger was. Opening her eyes, Sabrina decided that she and Ben should...
112122311212222.title: Some old guy in a lab coat

choices: Ben and Sabrina change their minds
1121223112122221.content:
“So, let me get this straight. You can’t get us back to ‘normal’,” Ben said, doing air quotes with his hands, “but you can make us remember what ‘normal’ actually is?”

Sabrina had allowed Percy to come in, and she had explained the situation to Ben. His reaction was the same as hers. He wasn’t sure if he believed what he was hearing, but he wasn’t going to deny that it made sense.

“That’s right,” said Percy. “At least for now. It will take quite some time to recreate the Reality Changer, but I do have a device at my house that will correct your memories.”

“How do we know you’re not just some crazy guy who’s gonna murder us or hold us hostage once we get there?” Ben said, crossing his arms.

“I suppose I have no way of making you trust me,” said Percy. “But I’m not forcing you to come with me.”

“We should go,” Sabrina said to Ben. “I’m not saying I believe him, but...”

“No, I understand,” said Ben. “Let me just get my purse.”

Once the trio was ready, they headed out to Percy’s car, and he drove in the direction of his home.

“I know this neighborhood,” Ben said when they were nearly at their destination. “This is only a few blocks from the movie theater. This is where we found the remote.”

“I just can’t believe that it was real. I convinced myself that it was just a crazy dream.”

“Yeah, me too.”

A few minutes later, they were at Percy’s house. Ben and Sabrina watched as Percy unlocked and opened the door, revealing a house that was much more unique on the inside than it outwardly appeared. Walking inside, they saw machines and devices in every corner, and none of them were recognizable. It was like walking into a spaceship in a science fiction movie.

Percy disappeared into the house, and quickly reappeared holding what looked like a helmet of some kind.

“All you have to do is put this on,” said Percy. “Then I’ll activate it, and you’ll have your proper memories back. So, who’s first?”
1121223112122221.title: Go with Dr. Edwards

11212231121222211.content:
“I’ll go first,” said Ben, taking the strange helmet and placing it on his head.

Percy flipped a few switches on the helmet, and it began to hum. Ben began to blink rapidly. When the humming stopped, the switches went back down by themselves, and Ben looked down at himself in shock.

“Ben, are you okay?”

Ben was speechless.

“Ready, Miss Green?” Percy asked, taking the helmet from Ben and offering it to Sabrina.

“Ben? Please say something.”

“Do it,” said Ben. “Put it on.”

Trusting him, Sabrina placed the helmet on her head, and the process was repeated. Sabrina’s mind suddenly raced. Memories of her life with a proper female body came rushing back to her. Despite how vivid her false memories had seemed, she knew that this was real.

“Oh my god!” Sabrina cried, taking the helmet off and tossing it aside.

“Careful!” said Percy. “What, breaking one of my inventions wasn’t enough?”

“Ben...” Sabrina stammered. “We... you’re... you have...”

“I have your body,” said Ben. “I’ve had your body for three fucking years. And the whole time, I thought it was normal.”

“This is crazy! How did this happen?” Sabrina asked. “Why didn’t we know?”

“The Reality Changer did exactly that. It changed reality,” said Percy. “Whoever used it had you both unaware of the changes.”

“But... I was the one who used it,” said Ben.

“Then you made some kind of mistake,” said Percy. “Or it malfunctioned. It was a prototype after all.”

“Well, now what?” Sabrina asked.

“Now, I have to get to work on making another one.”

“How long will that take?” Ben asked.

“At least a few days,” said Percy. “Possibly weeks, if I’m honest.”

“Weeks!?” said Sabrina.

“I’ll have to find my old research,” Percy explained. “After I lost the device, I lost track of some papers.”

“Well, maybe we can help you look,” said Ben.

Just then, Sabrina felt her phone vibrate. She pulled it out to see another text from her sister.

“It’s Grace. She wants to know where we are. What do I tell her?”

“Uh, just tell her we’re gonna miss the party.”

“We can’t just not go, Ben,” said Sabrina. “It’s a big deal.”

“Don’t let me keep you from your event,” said Percy. “I’ll even drive you there if you’d like.”
11212231121222211.title: Continue

112122311212222111.content:
“This is weird, this is weird, this is weird, this is so... fucking... weird,” Ben whispered to himself as he stepped out of Percy’s car at the Chan residence.

“Ben, relax,” said Sabrina, stepping up next to Ben and taking him by the hand. “Nobody else will know anything is wrong.”

“I know that,” said Ben, smoothing out his dress. “But we’ll know. And that’s going to make interacting with everyone difficult, whether they realize it or not.”

“It could be worse,” said Sabrina. Now, the couple was approaching the house. “At least we’re used to these bodies by now.”

“That’s another part of the problem,” said Ben. “I am used to this. And even though I think I want to switch back, I’m worried that I’ll be uncomfortable with my own body.”

“Wait. You think you want to switch back?”

“I obviously want to,” Ben corrected himself. “It’s just... for three years, this has been my body. And I think that once we switch back, adjusting will be... weird.”

“Ben...” Sabrina stopped walking and looked her fiancé in the eye. “Is it possible that you‘re not ready to switch back yet? Or... at all?”

“Hey! You made it!” they suddenly heard Grace shout. They looked over to see her approaching them.

“Of course we made it,” Sabrina said, letting go of Ben and hugging her little sister.

“You guys weren’t at your apartment,” said Grace.

“We, uh...” Sabrina struggled.

“We had to help a neighbor with something,” said Ben.

“The guy who just dropped you off?”

“Yeah, yeah,” Ben nodded. “That’s him.”

“Okay, well, I’m headed in,” said Grace. “You coming?”

Sabrina looked at Ben, then back at Grace. She felt like Ben had more to say, but she didn’t want to keep Grace or Maggie or anyone else waiting. Thinking it over, Sabrina decided it would be best to...
112122311212222111.title: Go to the party

1121223112122222.content:
“I... I think you should go,” Sabrina said to Percy.

“Miss Green-”

“Please leave,” she demanded. “My fiancé and I have somewhere to be.”

“Will you at least take this in case you change your mind?” Percy asked, holding out a business card for her to take.

“Fine,” Sabrina said, taking the card and putting it in her pocket. “Goodbye.”

With that, Sabrina slammed the door in Percy’s face. He was a bit upset to learn that his invention had been destroyed, but that also meant that he had no real reason to hang around. If this woman wanted to stay this way, he had no obligation to change her mind.

Back inside, Sabrina headed back into the bedroom just in time to see Ben coming out of the bathroom.

“Was someone at the door?” he asked.

“Um, yeah. It was just someone who had the wrong address,” she lied.

“That’s it?”

“What do you mean?”

“You slammed the door like you were upset.”

“Did I?”

“Oh well. Not important,” Ben said, shrugging. “Is Grace almost here?”

“She just texted me. She’s just around the block.”

“Texting and driving. For shame,” Ben remarked, causing Sabrina to smile and momentarily put her encounter with Dr. Edwards out of her mind.

A few minutes later, Grace arrived. The couple joined her in her car, and they headed to the Chan residence. On the way, Sabrina told her sister about the engagement, and Ben listened to them squeal for several minutes.
1121223112122222.title: Ignore him and go to the party

11212231121222221.content:
“Dude!” said Eric, spotting Ben walking onto the Chan property. He was dressed in a very flattering blazer, and like Sabrina, he had forgone the tie. He went straight for Ben, placing a hand on his friend’s shoulder. “Did you do it?”

“I did it,” Ben said, smiling.

“What did she say?”

“Wanna take a guess?” Sabrina chimed in, showing off the ring Ben had given her.

“Alright! Congrats, man!”

“Hey, where’s Maggie?” Sabrina asked.

“I just got here. I don’t know,” Eric answered.

Sabrina hugged Eric, kissed Ben, squealed with delight once more, then grabbed Grace by the hand and went inside the very large house.

_______________

“Maggie!” Sabrina said, rushing to hug her friend.

“Hey Miss College Grad!” Maggie cried, accepting the embrace. “Hi Grace!”

Grace went in for a hug as well, then stepped out of the way and gave Sabrina the floor.

“Maggie,” said Sabrina, giddy and barely able to contain herself. “Guess what.”

“I don’t know. What?”

“I’m going to change my name,” said Sabrina.

“You’re... changing your name? To what?”

“How does... Mrs. Benjamin Hansen sound to you?” Sabrina asked, making a show of displaying her ring.

“Oh! Sabrina! Oh my god!”

_______________

SEVERAL HOURS LATER

“Ben,” Sabrina said, scooting in and nuzzling against her fiancé, “do you want to have kids?”

“Yeah, probably,” Ben answered.

The couple was sitting down with their shoes off. Sabrina’s pants and Ben’s dress were rolled up, and their feet were dangling in the Chan’s indoor pool. Through the glass, they could see the sun beginning to rise.

“I can get ya pregnant right here, right now, if you want,” Sabrina said through slurred speech.

“Let’s not,” Ben muttered.

“You know what’s funny? If that old guy was serious about his remote, I could be... pregnant.“

“Old guy... what? You’re drunk,” said Ben.

“Mmmm. So are you.”

“Yeah.”

“I’m serious tho. He gave me, uh... a card and everything,” Sabrina said, reaching into her pocket and getting Percy’s business card to show Ben.

“I don’t want to look at a card,” said Ben, taking it from her and throwing it into the pool.

“Hey Sabrina,” Grace’s voice suddenly rang through the room. “I’m leaving.”

“Okay. Byeeeeee.”

“Sabrina, this is your sister,” said Grace, coming up behind the couple. “Do you want me to drive you home?”
11212231121222221.title: At the party

112122311212222211.content:
Sabrina awoke slowly. Very slowly. Looking at her phone, she wasn’t at all surprised to see that it was nearly 4:00 in the afternoon.

Turning over, she saw Ben. She smiled, knowing that some time in the future, they would be married. And that wasn’t all. Sabrina still had grad school to look forward to. And Ben would hopefully have a teaching job soon, which would help them decide if they wanted to be parents.

Sabrina yawned as she sat up and got out of bed. She walked across the floor to where her clothes had been discarded, along with Ben’s.

Curious, she reached down and picked up her pants, feeling for something in the pockets. When she came up empty, she did the same with her shirt, then her jacket. The card that Percy had given her was gone.

For a moment, Sabrina wondered if she should have listened to Percy. But the feeling passed.

Grinning wickedly, Sabrina rushed back over to the bed and whisked the covers away, exposing Ben’s naked body.

“Sabrina,” Ben whined, covering his boobs as they reacted to the cold air. “I’m gonna kill you.”

“Better come and get me, then,” she taunted, heading for the shower.

Sabrina and Ben never lost that playful spark. They really were perfect for each other, no matter what bodies they were supposed to have.

As time went by, Sabrina would forget she ever spoke to Percy, and he would likewise cease to think about her. Maybe in the future, their paths would cross again, but they didn’t care. After all, Percy had his work to occupy his thoughts. And Sabrina had a wedding to plan. She couldn’t be happier.
112122311212222211.title: Go home

112122311212222212.content:
“Go... go home, Grace,” Sabrina said, waving her sister away.

“At least let me help you to a bed,” Grace offered, helping Sabrina and Ben to their feet and leading them through the house.

“Your sister is so nice,” Ben muttered.

“Why don’t you marry her, then?” Sabrina giggled.

_______________

When Ben woke up, the first thing he did was check his phone. 3:30 pm. What a party.

As he looked around the room, he realized he and Sabrina were still at the Chan’s house, in a guest bedroom.

Letting Sabrina sleep for now, Ben climbed out of bed, smoothing out his dress as he stood up.

Where are my shoes? he wondered. Oh yeah. The pool.

Making his way through the house, Ben found his way to the indoor pool, where he spotted his heels, as well as Sabrina’s shoes. When he bent down to pick them up, something else caught his eye.

Curious, Ben reached over to fish out whatever it was that was floating in the corner of the pool, and examined it. It seemed to be a business card, for someone named Dr. Percy Edwards. He vaguely remembered something about it. But what? Sabrina. He thought. She had this. She said something about... an old guy, and... getting pregnant?

Admiring the quality of the card material, and wondering who this Edwards guy was, Ben held on to it, and gathered the shoes.

When he made it back to Sabrina, he saw that she was waking up. He wondered if he should question her about the card.
112122311212222212.title: Stay here

11212231122.content:
Just as the two were starting to lose control, they heard a door open, followed by someone shouting, “Hey you kids!”

“Ohmygod!” Sabrina said, sitting straight up and putting her hands in the air.

“Great,” said Ben.

“Alright,” said the security guard, approaching them and shining a flashlight in their direction. “Get decent and come out.”

12212.title: Sabrina

122121.content:
“Morning, Mags,” Sabrina called to her roommate, who was already up and dressed in a black tank top and white pants.

“Good morning,” Maggie replied, putting in her nose ring and sliding into a pair of black flats with gold buckles.

Sabrina got up, took a quick shower, then dressed herself in a tie-dye shirt, purple shorts, and pink socks. She then spent a minute on her makeup, but she didn’t fuss over it, as she had no intention of leaving the building today. Finally, she got her phone out of her purse, and got the remote from its hiding spot in her makeup kit. She checked her messages, and slid both items into opposite pockets in her shorts.

“Ready?” Sabrina asked, standing by the door.

“No shoes?” Maggie asked.

“I have a text from Ben that says he’s in the boys’ common room downstairs. I figure we could just hang out here at the dorms today,” Sabrina answered.

“Fair enough,” said Maggie.

The two girls then headed down the hall, down the stairs, and to the common room where Ben and Eric were seated at a study table, waiting for them. They were the only ones in the room. Ben was dressed in a plain white tee shirt, khaki shorts, and black socks. Eric was dressed in a gray muscle shirt, jeans, and the same white and green sneakers he had worn last night.

“Eric, I thought you didn’t want any part of this,” Sabrina pondered.

Eric shrugged. “I’m curious. What can I say? This better be real though. If you’re all pranking me, I’m transferring to a different school next year,” he joked.

“Okay, well, let’s get started,” said Sabrina. “Who’s our first test subject? One of us?”

“I say we wait for someone else to come in here,” said Ben. “Whoever comes through that door first.”

“Maggie, Eric, any thoughts?” Sabrina asked.

“I got nothing,” said Eric.

“You’ve got the remote,” said Maggie. “It’s your call.”
122121.title: Everything was still normal

122122.content:
Sabrina looked over to see what looked like Eric asleep in Maggie’s bed, wearing Maggie’s pajamas. She sat up, confused.

“Um, Eric? Or, Maggie?” she said loudly. Her own voice sounded a bit weird, but it was probably fine.

Eric’s body stirred, then awoke. “I’m Maggie. I haven’t swapped with anyone. You have the remote, remember?”

“Uh, that’s the thing. You say you’re Maggie, but I’m looking at Eric’s body.”

“That’s ridiculous,” said Maggie, getting up and looking in the mirror. “See? I’m fine.”

Puzzled, Sabrina reached into her nightstand and pulled out the makeup kit where she had hidden the remote. It was exactly where she had put it. But when she pulled it out, she noticed something. Her hand was a different color.

Now even more confused, Sabrina looked in the mirror herself, and saw the Iraqi face of Yasmine Hadid from down the hall looking back at her.

“Maggie, something is wrong. These aren’t our bodies,” Sabrina said, feeling her face.

“What are you talking about?”

“You definitely have Eric’s body. And I have Yasmine’s. The remote must have malfunctioned overnight. We have to fix this.”

“Sabrina, I’m pretty sure we’re normal,” Maggie tried to assure her roommate. “And if we’re not, then why would only you see it, and not both of us?”

“I don’t know. Maybe because I was the last one to touch the remote?”

Maggie thought for a moment, then spoke. “Sabrina...”
122122.title: Something wasn’t right

1221221.content:
“Sabrina, I believe you,” said Maggie.

“You do?”

“Yeah. As far as I can remember, I’ve had this body my entire life. But I know that the remote alters people’s minds every time something gets changed, so if you say something is wrong, I believe you.”

“Okay,” Sabrina let out a sigh or relief. “Well, I guess the first thing we should do is...”
1221221.title: “I believe you.”

12212211.content:
“You said you have Yasmine’s body?” Maggie asked.

“That’s right,” said Sabrina.

“Well, her room is the easiest place to start.”

“You think it’ll be that easy?” Sabrina asked. “You think that just because I have her body, she’ll have mine?”

“Do you have a better idea?”

“Not really,” said Sabrina, grabbing the remote before both girls headed out into the hall, still in their pajamas.

Walking to Yasmine and Macy’s room, Sabrina knocked on the door. After a moment, they could hear someone unlocking it.

“Hello?” a nerdy-looking male body answered the door.

“Macy,” Maggie spoke, recognizing what she thought was Macy’s rightful body. “Is Yasmine here?”

“Yeah. I’ll get her,” Macy said, walking away from the doorway and calling out her roommate’s name.

Sabrina rocked back and forth on her borrowed feet, waiting to see who’s body Yasmine was in. Finally, Yasmine approached.
12212211.title: “...find our real bodies.”

choices: Maggie wants to stay the way she is
122122111.content:
“Well, is that your body?” Maggie whispered to Sabrina.

Sabrina smiled, and discreetly fired the remote at Yasmine, switching the two of them back to normal.

“What can I do for you?” Yasmine asked politely, now back in her rightful body.

“You know what? I forgot,” Sabrina lied. “Mornings. Am I right?”

Sabrina then grabbed Maggie by the hand and led her further down the hallway. Once they were in the stairwell, and they heard Yasmine’s door close, Sabrina breathed a sigh of relief.

“Well?” Maggie came again.

“You were right. She had my body,” Sabrina explained. “That’s two people fixed. Who knows how many left.”

“Wait, you switched back?” asked Maggie. “I didn’t see anything.”

“Well, I’m definitely me again,” Sabrina said happily. “And if Yasmine had my body, that means Eric probably has yours.”

“Yeah, about that,” Maggie muttered. “Do you really need to swap me with anyone?”

“You want to go back to normal, don’t you?”

“According to my memories, this is normal,” Maggie said, gesturing at her current body. “What if I don’t want whatever body Eric has?”

“Maggie, if I do it right, you won’t even realize that you’ve been swapped.”

“That concerns me,” said Maggie. “I’m glad that you’re satisfied with your body, Sabrina. But what if your memories are the ones that are wrong?”

“Maggie,” Sabrina said gently, reaching up to put her hand on Maggie/Eric’s shoulder, “can you please trust me?”
122122111.title: Success! She has Sabrina’s body.

122122112.content:
“Well, is that your body?” Maggie whispered to Sabrina.

Sabrina frowned. The body Yasmine possessed was not Sabrina’s. It was Macy’s.

“What can I do for you?” Yasmine asked, her Arabic accent coming out with Macy’s raspy voice.

“Uh, you know what? Nothing,” Sabrina said, grabbing Maggie by the hand and leading her back into their own room.

“I take it that wasn’t the body you were hoping to see,” Maggie assumed.

“She has Macy’s body,” Sabrina explained. “And Macy had some guy’s body. I don’t know his name, but I know he has a room downstairs.”

“And you said I have Eric’s body?” Maggie remembered.

“Right.”

“Well, at least all the bodies we’ve seen so far have owners that live in this building,” said Maggie. “We can work with that, right?”

“I guess so,” Sabrina said, studying the remote. “I wish this thing had a reset button or something. That would make this so much easier.”

“I still think it’s weird that you’re the only one who remembers a different reality,” said Maggie.

“Wait a minute, this is normal for you,” Sabrina said, having a realization.

“Yes. That has been established,” Maggie deadpanned.

“And we pretty much know everyone who lives here in this building.”

“Okay?”

“Maggie! If I describe my body to you, do you think you would know who has it?”

“Hm. That’s worth a shot, I suppose. What does your body look like?”

“Okay, I have a female body. You know, with boobs and stuff,” Sabrina began. “And I’m white. And I have blonde hair, pretty much the same length as the hair I have now. And I’m pretty much the same height, too.”

“Well, I can think of three people like that,” Maggie said, thinking. “Are you a natural blonde, or is your hair dyed?”

“Natural,” Sabrina answered.

“Okay, two people. Is your body... um... round?”

“No,” Sabrina said, a bit insulted. “I happen to be in very good shape.”

“Hey, I’m just checking,” Maggie defended herself. “I think I know who has the body you're describing.”

“Awesome! Who is it?”
122122112.title: Nope. Not that easy.

“Can’t hurt to check,” Maggie said, shrugging.

The two girls made their way through the building to Lea’s room. Along the way, they noted how much bigger the rooms on the other side of the building were.

“You still want to be roommates next year, right?” Sabrina asked, knocking on Lea’s door.

“Of course.”

“If we’re early enough, do you think we’ll get a room over here?”

“If we don’t, my parents can always get us an apartment.”

“Ooh. That sounds nice.”

“Doesn’t it, though?”

“Hey,” they were suddenly greeted by...

“Maggie, Sabrina... what can I do for you?”

Maggie looked at Sabrina. Sabrina nodded, then discreetly fired the remote.

*FLASH*

“I should be hearing something in a week or two,” said Lea, now standing in Yasmine’s body. “But I don’t have anything for you yet. Sorry.”

“So that’s your body,” Maggie said, examining her friend. “It suits you.”

“You two looking for Lea?” asked a person approaching them in the hallway. The body they sported wasn’t Sabrina’s, but she recognized it nonetheless.

“Uh, yeah, is she here?” Sabrina asked, discreetly firing the remote and switching bodies with whoever this was.

“She’s not in there. She’s probably filling in at the front desk,” the person answered, now standing in Yasmine’s body. “Anything you want me to tell her if I see her come by?”

“Uh, no, we’re good,” said Sabrina, leading Maggie away. “Thanks.”

“Why did you switch with her?” Maggie whispered. “I thought you said your body was blonde.”

“My body is blonde. This body is yours.”

“It’s obviously yours,” said Sabrina. “Look at how much I look like your mom.”

“Well, do you want it or not?”

“Sabrina, you’re not thinking straight,” Maggie said, walking over and putting a masculine hand on Sabrina’s shoulder. “I think you should give me the remote before you do anything drastic.”

Unfortunately, Maggie had the remote. Sabrina trusted her roommate not to do anything drastic, but she wished she had kept it for herself. Unable to make any swaps for the time being, Sabrina decided that her best course of action would be to...

12212221.title: Talk to Ben

“Sabrina?” Ben said, coming all the way out and closing the door behind him. “Is it really you?”

“Yeah, it’s me. Do you realize what’s going on?”

“I do. I’m clearly not myself,” Ben said, grabbing his new breasts. “And neither is Eric. But he didn’t believe me. He called me crazy and went back to sleep.”

“Well, Maggie is awake, and she has Eric’s body,” Sabrina explained. “She thinks I’m crazy too.”

“Maggie has Eric’s body?” Ben echoed.

“Yeah. Does he have hers?”

“Well, at least it seems like only people in this building were swapped.”

“The remote!” Ben said happily. “It can fix this! Where is it?”

“Maggie has it,” Sabrina said, crossing her borrowed arms across her borrowed chest. “We could try asking her for it, but she won’t give it to us. As far as she’s concerned, everything is perfectly normal.”

The blouse came down a decent ways, but not far enough to hide Eric’s package, which was proudly displayed as a sizable bulge in Maggie’s leggings.

“Janelle,” Sabrina replied. “It’s so weird, being the only one who remembers things being different.”

Maggie thought about what Sabrina was saying. Until this morning, Sabrina and Ben had been the only ones to touch the remote. And Sabrina was the closest person to it during the night. Was it possible that what Sabrina said was true? Did their bodies really belong to Eric and Yasmine? Or had the remote just messed with Sabrina’s mind?

Looking at her downhearted friend, Maggie decided to...

At that moment, Ben and Eric both realized that Maggie hadn’t said anything. They looked up at the same time, and they saw Eric’s body, frowning, arms crossed.

“Benjamin,” said Maggie. “Did you just trap me in a boy’s body with no way out?”
